title: 別の会員としてメッセージを作る

input.factory: () => ({ template: { name: "Original", rank: "silver", format: function(prefix) { return prefix + ": " + this.name + " (" + this.rank + ")"; } }, target: { name: "Aki", rank: "gold" }, prefix: "member" })

() => ({ template: { name: "Base", rank: "standard", format: function(prefix) { return prefix + ": " + this.name + " (" + this.rank + ")"; } }, target: { name: "Ren", rank: "guest" }, prefix: "visitor" })
() => ({ template: { name: "Template", rank: "none", format: function(prefix) { return prefix + ": " + this.name + " (" + this.rank + ")"; } }, target: { name: "Mio", rank: "trial" }, prefix: "" })
